languages.text: {n}Вы знаете, что говорите чистую правду. Вам начинает казаться, что во взгляде мужчины на портрете читается вера в вас.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Вы знаете, что говорите чистую правду. Он тоже знает — пусть и не может вам ответить.{/n}

languages.text: {n}You know you speak the truth. You begin to think that the man in the portrait is looking back at you with faith in his eyes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы знаете, что говорите чистую правду. Вам начинает казаться, что во взгляде мужчины на портрете читается вера в вас.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You know you speak the truth. You begin to think that the man in the portrait is looking back at you with faith in his eyes.{/n}
{n}You know you speak the truth. You begin to think that the man in the portrait is looking back at you with faith in his eyes.{/n}
{n}You know you speak the truth. You begin to think that the man in the portrait is looking back at you with faith in his eyes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたは、自分の言葉が真実だと分かっている。やがて肖像の男が、信頼の色を湛えた眼差しであなたを見返しているように思えてくる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You know you speak the truth. You begin to think that the man in the portrait is looking back at you with faith in his eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたは、自分の言葉が真実だと分かっている。やがて肖像の男が、信頼の色を湛えた眼差しであなたを見返しているように思えてくる。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous savez que vous ne trahirez pas votre promesse. Vous avez l'impression que l'homme du portrait vous regarde maintenant d'un air confiant.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You know you speak the truth. You begin to think that the man in the portrait is looking back at you with faith in his eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous savez que vous ne trahirez pas votre promesse. Vous avez l'impression que l'homme du portrait vous regarde maintenant d'un air confiant.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Doğru söylediğini biliyorsun. Portredeki adamın sana inanç dolu gözlerle baktığını düşünmeye başlıyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You know you speak the truth. You begin to think that the man in the portrait is looking back at you with faith in his eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Doğru söylediğini biliyorsun. Portredeki adamın sana inanç dolu gözlerle baktığını düşünmeye başlıyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du weißt, dass du recht hast. Du hast den Eindruck, als würde der Mann auf dem Porträt deinen Blick hoffnungsvoll erwidern.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You know you speak the truth. You begin to think that the man in the portrait is looking back at you with faith in his eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du weißt, dass du recht hast. Du hast den Eindruck, als würde der Mann auf dem Porträt deinen Blick hoffnungsvoll erwidern.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sabes que dices la verdad. Empiezas a creer que el hombre del retrato te devuelve la mirada con fe en los ojos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You know you speak the truth. You begin to think that the man in the portrait is looking back at you with faith in his eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sabes que dices la verdad. Empiezas a creer que el hombre del retrato te devuelve la mirada con fe en los ojos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你深知自己说的是实话。你开始觉得，肖像中的男人正以充满信心的目光回望着你。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You know you speak the truth. You begin to think that the man in the portrait is looking back at you with faith in his eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你深知自己说的是实话。你开始觉得，肖像中的男人正以充满信心的目光回望着你。{/n}
